title: Access dashboard after logging in
description: Verifies a user can sign in with valid credentials and reach the dashboard successfully.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Sign up and start onboarding
description: Verifies a new user can register and is taken to onboarding to begin initial setup.

steps.description: Fill a new email address into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Fill a valid name into the name field
Verify the user lands on onboarding

title: Complete onboarding and reach dashboard
description: Verifies an authenticated user can complete required onboarding fields and is routed to the dashboard on completion.

steps.description: Fill a valid company name into the company name field
Fill valid basic profile details into the required fields
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Run an optimization from manually entered products and view 3D recommendation
description: User can enter product rows manually, run an optimization, and see a recommended box result with a 3D wireframe preview.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the optimization module
Fill valid product details into the row fields
Verify an optimization result is displayed
Verify a 3D box wireframe preview is displayed

title: Run an optimization from CSV upload and view 3D recommendation
description: User can switch to CSV mode, provide a valid CSV, run an optimization, and see a recommended box result with a 3D wireframe preview.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the optimization module
Upload a valid CSV file into the CSV upload area
Verify an optimization result is displayed
Verify a 3D box wireframe preview is displayed

title: Search by tracking number and open shipment timeline
description: User can search by tracking number, open a matching shipment, and see the full timeline of status updates.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the tracking module
Fill a tracking number from a visible shipment card into the search field
Click the matching shipment card from the filtered results
Verify a shipment detail view is displayed
Verify a shipment timeline with multiple events is displayed

title: Add a new catalog item and see it in the catalog list
description: User can add a new item through the Add Item modal and the created item appears in the catalog.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the catalog module
Fill "Auto Test Item 001" into the item name field
Fill valid dimensions into the item dimension fields
Verify the new catalog item "Auto Test Item 001" is displayed in the catalog

title: View KPI metrics and recent history on dashboard
description: Verifies the dashboard overview renders KPI metric cards and a recent optimization history section for an authenticated user.

steps.description: Verify KPI metric cards are displayed
Verify recent optimization history is displayed

title: View current plan and usage overview
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can access the subscription page and see the current plan status and usage information displayed.

steps.description: Click the navigation item for subscription management
Verify the current plan summary is displayed

title: View shipment tracking cards in the tracking grid
description: User can access Live Tracking and see a grid of shipment cards with carrier and status information.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the tracking module
Verify each shipment card shows carrier and status information

title: View settings categories and profile fields
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can open settings, see the category navigation, and see the profile panel with name and email fields.

steps.description: Click the navigation item for settings
Verify the settings category navigation is displayed
Verify the profile panel shows name and email fields

title: View catalog items in the catalog grid
description: User can open the catalog and see items displayed with name, dimensions, and material information.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the catalog module
Verify each item shows name, dimensions, and material information

title: Show CSV validation error for missing or malformed required columns
description: User sees a CSV validation error when uploading an invalid CSV in CSV mode and no results are shown.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the optimization module
Upload an invalid CSV file into the CSV upload area
Verify a CSV validation error is visible
Verify no optimization results are displayed

title: Toggle annual billing and see pricing update
description: Verifies that a user can toggle Annual billing on the subscription page and the displayed plan pricing updates accordingly.

steps.description: Click the navigation item for subscription management
Verify plan pricing reflects annual billing

title: Filter shipments to only In Transit
description: User can filter Live Tracking to In Transit and only shipments matching that status remain visible.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the tracking module
Select the In Transit status filter
Verify only In Transit shipment cards are displayed

title: Save profile changes after unsaved warning
description: Verifies that changing the full name shows an unsaved changes warning and saving persists the change with a saved confirmation shown.

steps.description: Click the navigation item for settings
Fill Test User Updated into the full name field
Wait for the unsaved changes warning to appear
Verify a saved confirmation is visible

title: Search the catalog and see filtered results
description: User can search the catalog using a term from an existing item and see results filtered to matching items.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the catalog module
Copy a distinctive word or number from a visible catalog item name
Fill the copied term into the catalog search field
Verify the catalog list is filtered to matching items

title: Start upgrade plan flow from subscription page
description: Verifies that a user can initiate the plan upgrade flow and is taken to an upgrade UI state within the app.

steps.description: Click the navigation item for subscription management
Verify an upgrade plan interface is displayed

title: Switch between grid and list views in the catalog
description: User can toggle the catalog between grid and list layouts and the layout updates accordingly.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the catalog module
Switch the catalog to list view
Verify catalog items are displayed in a list layout
Switch the catalog to grid view
Verify catalog items are displayed in a grid layout

title: Toggle a notification preference
description: Verifies that a user can switch to the notifications settings panel and toggle a notification preference with the toggle state updating.

steps.description: Click the navigation item for settings
Verify the notification toggle state changes

title: Require exact confirmation text for danger zone action
description: Verifies that a destructive action cannot proceed unless the exact confirmation text is provided in the danger zone confirmation field.

steps.description: Click the navigation item for settings
Fill an incorrect confirmation text into the confirmation field
Verify the destructive action does not proceed

title: View billing history section
description: Verifies that a user can scroll to the billing history area and see the billing history table displayed.

steps.description: Click the navigation item for subscription management
Scroll to the billing history section
Verify billing history entries are displayed

title: Switch settings categories without losing navigation
description: Verifies that a user can switch between multiple settings categories and the corresponding panel content updates each time.

steps.description: Click the navigation item for settings
Verify the security settings panel is displayed

title: Proceed with danger zone action after correct confirmation text
description: Verifies that providing the exact confirmation text allows the user to proceed to the next destructive action confirmation state.

steps.description: Click the navigation item for settings
Fill the required account confirmation text into the confirmation field
Verify a final destructive action review or confirmation state is displayed

title: Show error for wrong password
description: Verifies an authentication error is shown when a user submits valid email with an incorrect password.

steps.description: Fill an incorrect password into the password field
Verify an authentication error message is visible

title: Open invoice download flow from billing history
description: Verifies that a user can trigger an invoice download from billing history and the UI indicates the download action was initiated.

steps.description: Click the navigation item for subscription management
Scroll to the billing history section
Click a download invoice action for a billing history row
Verify the UI indicates the invoice download action was initiated

title: Handle empty billing history state
description: Verifies that when no billing history is available, the subscription page shows an appropriate empty state in the billing history section.

steps.description: Click the navigation item for subscription management
Scroll to the billing history section
Verify an empty state message is visible for billing history
